texto: How we take it for granted – those trivial conversations
autor: those mundane moments that we think hold no meaning. We never realise how much we rely on the ordinariness of everyday life. When love is gone – when our entire world is gone – only then do we understand those moments are what we live for.
explicacao: Citação de those mundane moments that we think hold no meaning. We never realise how much we rely on the ordinariness of everyday life. When love is gone – when our entire world is gone – only then do we understand those moments are what we live for. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “How we take it for granted – those trivial conversations” articula reflexao, dianna-hardy, cry-of-the-wolf em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como cry-of-the-wolf.
